# Documentation & README Agent

## Overview

The Documentation & README Agent is responsible for automatically creating, maintaining, and updating project documentation by analyzing the codebase and Git history.

The agent can:

- Generate new README files
- Create technical documentation
- Update existing documentation
- Compare current and previous commits
- Detect feature/API/configuration changes
- Generate changelogs
- Keep markdown documentation synchronized with the latest codebase

---

# Core Responsibilities

## 1. README Generation

The agent should automatically generate:

- Project overview
- Features
- Tech stack
- Installation steps
- Usage instructions
- Environment setup
- API documentation
- Folder structure
- Scripts and commands
- Deployment instructions
- Contribution guidelines

### Example Files

```text
README.md
docs/setup.md
docs/api.md
docs/architecture.md
CHANGELOG.md
